creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
As noted by Hiren...

> For future reference, correct way to specify phabric review is:
> Differential Revision: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D1711
>
> This triggers changes to the review on phabricator with reference to this
> commit.
>
> Cheers,
> Hiren

This should be added to the Commit Log Messages chapter in the Committer's Guide:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/committers-guide/commit-log-message.html
